title: Strategy of SADCC/ICRISAT Regional Programme on the Improvement of Sorghum and Millets as Forages
abstract: Outlines the strategy of SADCC/ICRISAT regional programme on the improvement of sorghum and millets as forages. Looks into results of the cereal forage yield trial, forage sorghum introduction nursery, breeding programme and 1988-89 evaluation trials. Lists the main collaborators on a country wise basis.
